titleStmt.title: SII 7.373: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 373. (A.R. No. 168-G of 1901). ON ANOTHER SLAB LYING IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁggaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanaga
rāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śakava 1389 varttamā
na vyavahārika sarvvajitsaṁvvatsarada mārggaśira śu 1 lū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājapara
mēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvirūpākṣarāyamahārāyarū Anēkarājyābhyudayagaḷi
ṁ pratipālisutiha kāladoḷu A rāyarā daṇāyakara nirūpadiṁ koṁḍerājavoḍeyarū
bārakūra nāḷuva kāladalli bo(ṁ)mmiseṭṭiya baḷiya viṭhṭhalaseṭṭiya maga hegaḍebaḷiya Aṁ
maseṭṭi maṇigāṟakēryya śrīsōmanāthaṁge māḍida dha(ṁ)rmmada vivara yeḍeveṭṭina bayaloḷa
ge tā ddha braṁhmādāyada mūlada bāḷina catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu kāraṁtara gaḍi
yiṁdaṁ hēraḷarā gaḍiyiṁdaṁ yeḍeveṭṭina śaṁkaranārāyaṇadēvara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ yi mū
ṟu gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu śaṁkaranārāyaṇadēvara gaḍiyiṁ puruṣaṇaseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁ
daṁ yi yeraḍu gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu mayyakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu mattaṁ mayya
kkaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu hāḷakkaḷa karaṇikaragaḍiyiṁdaṁ śaṁkaranārāyaṇadēvara gaḍiyiṁ mūḍa
lu baḍagalu dēmahēraḷa yeraḍu gaḍiyiṁda teṁkalu yi muṟu muḍeyu yippattu hāne bituva
ḍalu śaṁkaraseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
lu hēraḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu Ayanabaḷiya vīrakāraṁta
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu śaṁkaraseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yī nālku ga
gadde hāna mūvattu mattaṁ paḍuva gadeya bāḷa catussīmeya viva
ra mūḍalu kāraṁtara Aḷiya kāṟara yī mūṟu gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu
Ayarāḍiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu śaṁkaraseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu
nāgaṇaseṭṭiya gaḍiya vōṇiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeyoḷaguḷa bittuva bedegaṇa
gilu nāghaṁḍugadalū mu 18 lu motadalū hadineṁṭu mūḍe
jana 2 [kke Akki] mu 20 [A]rāḍiya kaṭṭiya daṁṇitige Akki mu 1 . Ubhayaṁ yippattu mūḍe
(mūḍe) Akkiyanū sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṭṭevu yī dhar(ṁ)mmavanū Āro
kramācārakke maṇigāṟakēryya halaru seṭṭikāṟaru nilisikoḷuvaru yī dhar(ṁ)mma
Aḷupiya vāraṇāsiyallinūṟeṁṭu kavileya kondapātakakke hōharu .
sōmanāthadēvara voppa .
Digital edition of SII 7.373 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
